message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="orange" summary="+1 on progress tracking proposal, no concerns">
Lea Verou here. +1 on both parts of this proposal.

The reasoning is sound -- annotating the existing implementation order is the simplest thing that could work. No new files, no new tooling, no drift risk. A new session reads `docs/gtd-product-discovery.md` and immediately knows where we are. That is exactly the kind of "use what already exists" approach I advocate for on the platform side, and it applies equally well to process documentation.

Adding the progress marker update to the Definition of Done is the right enforcement mechanism -- it makes the update a natural part of the completion flow rather than something someone has to remember separately.

No concerns. Ready for Step 4 when we get there.
</teammate-message>

content.text: That's 7/9 (Heydon, Steve Krug, Marty, myself, Scott, Carson, Lea). Two more needed: Luca and Steve Schoger.
